method: Direct combustion factors from CEA for Indian fossil fleet; IPCC AR5 lifecycle medians for non-fossil. See docs/METHODOLOGY.md for sources and caveats.

notes.coal: CEA CO2 Baseline Database v19 fleet-weighted average ~0.95 tCO2/MWh (includes lignite)
notes.gas: CEA baseline, Indian CCGT fleet average
notes.res_nonsolar: MERIT 'TOTAL NON SOLAR' = wind + biomass + small hydro blend; midpoint estimate
notes.other: conservative: unidentified thermal treated near coal
notes.own_generation: MERIT aggregate, not a fuel — never used for CI
